# WTG Knowledge Base

> Centrally managed knowledge for Solution Architecture and SDLC automation.

## Context
This repository contains curated knowledge for a Google Partner Solution Architect. It is used to provide context to AI agents (Cursor, Jules) and as a human-readable documentation site.

## Navigation
- [GCP Patterns](docs/gcp/index.md): Standardized cloud architectures.
- [Business Processes](docs/business/index.md): Solution design and delivery logic.
- [AI Skills](docs/skills/index.md): Optimized instructions for LLMs.
